nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pallidiventris is found in Brazil south of the Amazon between the Tapajós River and northern Maranhão and locally in eastern Rondônia and northern Mato Grosso. The cinnamon-crested spadebill primarily inhabits terra firme forest, where it greatly favors brushy undergrowth and dense stands of saplings
